name: API Gateway
documentation: FastAPI REST API layer (IL-046). 78 endpoints across 21 routers.

name: Safeguarding Service
documentation: CASS 15 safeguarding: daily reconciliation, breach detection, FIN060 return. Sprint 12.

name: Tri-Party Reconciliation Engine
documentation: CASS 7.15.17R daily tri-party recon: rails vs Midaz GL vs safeguarding bank. GAP-010.

name: KYC Service
documentation: KYC workflow lifecycle: create → documents → EDD → approve/reject. Ballerine adapter.

name: Payment Service
documentation: FPS + SEPA CT + SEPA Instant via Modulr sandbox. Webhook signature verification.

name: AML / Fraud Service
documentation: FraudAML pipeline with Jube (self-hosted ML). PSR APP 2024 compliant.

name: IAM Service
documentation: Keycloak OIDC + RBAC. MockIAMAdapter for tests. KeycloakAdapter for production.

name: Ledger Service
documentation: Midaz CBS adapter. get_balance(), create_transaction(), list_transactions(). S13-01.

name: Customer Onboarding
documentation: EMR 2011 Reg.4 — customer creation + KYC + agreement lifecycle.

name: Daily Reconciliation
documentation: CASS 7.15.17R — daily internal (Midaz) vs external (CAMT.053) reconciliation. Cron at 23:50 UTC.

name: SAR Filing
documentation: POCA 2002 s.330 — Suspicious Activity Report lifecycle: file → MLRO approve → submit NCA.

name: Midaz CBS
documentation: Core Banking System. Self-hosted on GMKtec :8095. Double-entry GL ledger.

name: Keycloak IAM
documentation: Keycloak 26.2.5 OIDC. Realm: banxe. GMKtec :8180. 7 roles.

name: ClickHouse Audit DB
documentation: Append-only audit trail. TTL 5 years (FCA MLR 2017 I-08). Tables: safeguarding_events, recon_events.

name: Marble Case Management
documentation: Self-hosted Apache 2.0 case management. MLRO inbox, case assignment. GMKtec :5002. I-19: internal only.

name: TransactionRecord
documentation: Immutable transaction record. amount_gbp: Decimal (I-05). status: APPROVED|PENDING|CANCELLED.

name: CustomerProfile
documentation: Customer entity with KYC status, risk tier, agreement refs. PII fields encrypted at rest.
